configurePresets.name: default
configurePresets.displayName: MPI-ON gating build (prefix: mpi — GPU NONE, DOUBLE)
configurePresets.description: The standing gate: full ctest suite including the 1/2/4-rank MPI tiers. Prefix from tools/provision-amrex.sh mpi; WLI_AMREX_HOME defaults to $HOME/wli-amrex (tools/build.sh exports it).

configurePresets.name: serial
configurePresets.description: MPI off; the bare-name 1-rank suite here is the 1-rank == serial cross-check.

configurePresets.name: single
configurePresets.description: amrex::Real is float; proves wli::Real stays double independently. Full suite.

configurePresets.name: cuda
configurePresets.description: nvcc compile of library + suite; nothing executes. tools/test.sh refuses this preset.

configurePresets.name: rocm
configurePresets.description: amdclang++ compile of library + suite (set CXX=/opt/rocm/bin/amdclang++; AMReX enforces a HIP-capable compiler); nothing executes. tools/test.sh refuses this preset.

configurePresets.name: notests
configurePresets.displayName: Library-only build (prefix: mpi) — no tests registered
configurePresets.description: The Cactus consumption shape: wli_lib alone, ctest -N lists 0. tools/test.sh refuses this preset.

configurePresets.name: guard-trip
configurePresets.description: Requests WLI_GPU_BACKEND=CUDA against the GPU-NONE mpi prefix so the consistency guard trips; exists solely for the negative check (inverted exit + grep 'AMReX GPU-backend mismatch'). Never built, never tested.
